```python
data = [5, 10, 15, 20, 25]
hasil = []
for i in range(len(data)):
    if data[i] > 10:
        hasil.append(data[i] - 5)
print(hasil)
```
Apa output dari kode tersebut?
answer: [10, 15, 20]
distractors: [15, 20, 25] | [5, 10, 15] | [0, 5, 10, 15, 20]
